subject: Spoink, a small pig-like creature with a coiled spring for a tail, depicted in a cluttered urban alley setting with hanging laundry
description: A small, round pig-like creature balances on a spring-like coiled tail in what appears to be a cluttered urban alley or courtyard. The environment behind it shows hanging laundry strung between buildings, stacked items, and the general feel of a lived-in urban space. The creature has a rounded body, small features, and a pearl-like orb visible on its head. The setting gives the card an unexpectedly grounded, neighborhood quality. The palette is muted with warm and cool greys.
foreground: small pig-like creature balancing on a coiled spring tail
background: urban alley with hanging laundry, buildings, cluttered environment
